o: dark premium with white body — contact/footer use dark backgrounds (#0a0a14), main body is white (#ffffff)
#ff0336 (vibrant red) — used for CTAs, accents, focus states, icon backgrounds
linear-gradient(135deg, #ff0336 0%, #e0002b 100%) — buttons, icon boxes
linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a14 0%, #111128 50%, #0c0c1a 100%) — contact section
#ffffff (on dark), #111111 (on light)
#9a9cb8 — secondary text on dark backgrounds
#6b6d87 — form placeholders, select default
rgba(255,255,255,0.03) with backdrop-filter: blur(6-8px) — cards, form wrapper
1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06-0.07) — subtle glass borders
16px for cards, 20px for large containers, 12px for inputs/buttons, 14px for icon boxes
inherit (uses Gymate template fonts) — fallback: Arial, sans-serif for loading state
700-800 for headings, 700 for buttons/labels
clamp(28px, 4vw, 44px) — fluid typography for section titles
80px vertical padding (56px on tablet, tighter on mobile)
1200px for content containers
all 0.3s ease — used on buttons, cards, inputs
translateY(-2px) + enhanced box-shadow on hover
translateX(6px) + red-tinted border on hover
border-color: #ff0336 + box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,3,54,0.1)
radial-gradient circles with rgba(255,3,54,0.06-0.08) — top-right and bottom-left of contact section
max-width: 900px — single column layout
max-width: 600px — stacked form rows, tighter padding
FontAwesome 6 (fa-solid) — fallback SVGs for social icons
all flaticon-* classes replaced with fa-solid equivalents at runtime
BEM-style with 'rk-' prefix: rk-hero, rk-button, rk-site-header, rk-contact-section
custom arrow SVG via background-image, dark option background (#151525)
custom CSS overrides in app.css layered on top of Gymate template stylesheets
